g.text: VDBE Bytecode — Nested Loop JOIN: orders JOIN customers ON orders.cust_id = customers.id
addr | opcode | p1 | p2 | p3 | semantics
2 | Rewind | c=0 | 10 | 0 | outer: position first; empty → Halt (10)
3 | Rewind | c=1 | 9 | 0 | inner: position first; empty → outer Next (9)
4 | Column | c=0 | 2 | r1 | r1 = orders.cust_id (outer join key)
5 | Column | c=1 | 0 | r2 | r2 = customers.id (inner join key)
6 | Ne | r1 | 8 | r2 | r1 != r2: no match, jump 8 (skip emit)
7 | ResultRow | r3 | 4 | 0 | EMIT 4 columns — matched join pair
8 | Next | c=1 | 4 | 0 | inner advance: more rows → jump 4
9 | Next | c=0 | 3 | 0 | outer advance: more rows → jump 3
10 | Halt | 0 | 0 | 0 | all pairs processed — VM stops
Purple | ResultRow: joined pair emitted to result set
Dashed | Loop-back jump (PC set by p2 operand)
addr 6: Ne r1 r2 — join condition: cust_id = id ?
addr 7: ResultRow r3 N=4 — EMIT MATCHED PAIR
addr 4: Column c=0 col=2 → r1 = orders.cust_id
addr 5: Column c=1 col=0 → r2 = customers.id
r1 and r2 loaded into registers
p2=4 more inner rows → jump back
p2=3 reset inner cursor for next outer row
